name: colour-vault
description: Post-quantum resistant open source cryptographic vault protocol
author: Colour Foundation <buildwithcolours@gmail.com>

scripts.install:all: cd mcp && npm install && cd ../interface && npm install
scripts.build: cd core && cargo build --release && cd ../mcp && npm run build
scripts.test: cd core && cargo test && cd ../mcp && npm test
scripts.audit:all: npm run audit:rust && npm run audit:node
